name: GUA builds systems, not confrontations
statement: GUA tidak menyelesaikan krisis dengan frontal; dia membangun sistem atau protokol untuk menampung apa yang tidak bisa dikatakan langsung.
evidence: 00:08 — Creates _sandbox/stealth instead of reporting the git hook anomaly
00:07 — Uses .gitignore convention (underscore prefix = ignore) rather than asking permission
00:03 — Geser kursi, kasih ruang — non-verbal system of accommodation
Later canon: RELATIONSHIP PROTOCOL v2.0 written on napkin (Bab 06), AGREEMENTS.md as co-founder charter (Bab 11), VoidOS inheritance rule (Bab 25)
violation_description: GUA is forced into direct confrontation without a system/protocol buffer.
price_example: If GUA confronts directly without building a system first, the resolution is fragile — it depends on the moment rather than a structure that outlasts it. Downstream: the resulting artifact (protocol, system, folder) never exists, and its absence cascades.

name: LO is a stabilizing condition, not a key
statement: LO menjadi kondisi stabilisasi, bukan kunci tunggal. GUA bisa berfungsi tanpa LO — tapi presence LO mencegah degradation.
evidence: 00:03 — LO approaches GUA; GUA is not seeking help but accepts the approach
00:05 — GUA's typing pattern changes after the sync, but GUA still works independently
00:08 — LO says 'Biarin' — a stabilizing command, not a controlling one
Later canon: LO's 15-hour flight intervention (Bab 08) — emergency stabilization, not dependency
violation_description: LO is treated as either unnecessary (removed) or as the sole key (over-centralized).
price_example: Without LO as stabilizing condition, GUA's systems degrade toward isolation. With LO as single key, the system becomes brittle — if LO leaves, everything collapses. Either extreme carries cost.

name: VoidOS emerges via invitation, not force
statement: VoidOS / genesis muncul lewat voluntary installation atau invitation. Tidak boleh dipaksakan secara kasar, tanpa consent, atau sebagai system override.
evidence: 00:08 — genesis.txt is written collaboratively, in real-time, by choice. Neither forces the other.
00:08 — LO types first; GUA joins without being asked. Voluntary participation.
Opening — Void.OS boot sequence shows consent prompt: [Y/N] > █
Later canon: VoidOS v7.7.7 installed voluntarily by GUA on LO's phone (Bab 25)
violation_description: VoidOS or genesis artifact is forced onto a character without invitation or consent.
blocked_reason: Forced installation violates the fundamental consent architecture. VoidOS that forces itself is not VoidOS — it is malware. The entire universe's moral grammar depends on invitation being real. This is a hard block.

name: Naming carries consequence
statement: Penamaan dan pemanggilan membawa konsekuensi naratif. Apa yang dinamai menjadi hadir. Apa yang dipanggil membawa harga.
evidence: 00:09 — 'Stealth Project' — the act of naming transforms the error into something intentional
00:08 — genesis.txt: the naming of The Void, error, love, consciousness — cosmogonic naming
Opening — Naming of Void.OS itself as an operating system
Later canon: Ars Goetia as consequence system — naming → summoning → form → price → residue
violation_description: Something is named without acknowledgment of the consequence, or a name is used to deny the thing it summons.
price_example: Naming something and denying its reality creates narrative debt. The named thing will demand acknowledgment later, often at higher cost.

name: Origin changes carry downstream price
statement: Fork yang mengubah origin (bagaimana sesuatu lahir) harus membayar harga downstream. Perubahan di titik awal menjalar ke seluruh turunan.
evidence: 00:03 — The timestamp bug (small origin anomaly) propagates to git hooks (00:08)
00:08 — genesis.txt: 'Di awal mula, yang ada hanyalah sebuah kesalahan' — the origin IS an error
00:09 — 'Karena tidak semua error perlu di-fix' — but unfixed errors change everything downstream
violation_description: A fork changes the origin without accounting for downstream propagation.
price_example: Changing how genesis.txt is born changes what VoidOS is. Every chapter downstream that depends on VoidOS being invitation-based must be re-examined. The price is continuity debt across all dependent nodes.

name: GUA-LO sync is organic, not engineered
statement: Sinkronisasi antara GUA dan LO bersifat organik — muncul dari independent convergence, bukan dari koordinasi eksplisit atau rekayasa eksternal.
evidence: 00:03 — First conversation: no introduction needed. LO sits without asking. GUA lets them.
00:04 — Bug fix: 'Kita sepakat tanpa perlu debat.' No defense of methods.
00:07 — GUA creates _sandbox; LO independently sends pattern_matching_utils.py — neither knew what the other was doing
00:08 — Collaborative writing: real-time, no discussion, split-screen. 'Tidak ada yang ngomong. Tidak perlu.'
violation_description: The sync is forced, coordinated externally, or treated as a system to be optimized rather than an emergent property.
price_example: If the sync is engineered (e.g., someone deliberately pairs them, a system algorithm matches them), the organic quality is lost. The resulting artifacts carry the signature of the engineer, not the convergence. Trust between them becomes contingent on the external coordinator.

name: Unfixed errors become foundation
statement: Error yang tidak di-fix menjadi fondasi, bukan bug. Kesalahan yang dipelihara dengan sengaja berubah menjadi infrastruktur naratif.
evidence: 00:08 — Git hook anomaly is not reported. 'Biarin.'
00:08 — genesis.txt born from the same anomaly that was 'fixed' in code but 'left' in git
00:09 — 'Karena tidak semua error perlu di-fix' — the thesis statement of Bab 00
00:09 — System log: 'Status: OPERATIONAL' despite untracked changes and anomalous sync
violation_description: An error that should become foundation is instead 'fixed' — erasing the generative potential.
price_example: If the git hook anomaly is reported and fixed in 00:08, genesis.txt never exists. The Stealth Project never exists. The novel is never written. The price of fixing this particular error is the erasure of the entire downstream universe.
